scripts.build: node scripts/kill-wr-desk.cjs && node scripts/dist-clean-artifacts.cjs && node scripts/copy-pnpm-transitive-deps.cjs && vite build && node scripts/smoke-pdfjs-parser.cjs && node scripts/clean-windows-build-output.cjs && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs && node scripts/verify-windows-unpacked.cjs
scripts.rebuild: node scripts/kill-wr-desk.cjs && node scripts/rebuild.cjs && node scripts/dist-clean-artifacts.cjs && node scripts/copy-pnpm-transitive-deps.cjs && vite build && node scripts/smoke-pdfjs-parser.cjs && node scripts/clean-windows-build-output.cjs && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs && node scripts/verify-windows-unpacked.cjs
scripts.dist: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['dist','dist-electron'].forEach(d=>{if(fs.existsSync(d)){fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true});console.log('Cleaned '+d)}})" && tsc && vite build && node scripts/smoke-pdfjs-parser.cjs && node scripts/clean-windows-build-output.cjs && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs && node scripts/verify-windows-unpacked.cjs
scripts.build:clean: node scripts/clean.cjs && electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar,canvas && vite build && node scripts/smoke-pdfjs-parser.cjs && node scripts/clean-windows-build-output.cjs && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs && node scripts/verify-windows-unpacked.cjs
scripts.build:portable: node scripts/dist-clean-artifacts.cjs && vite build && node scripts/smoke-pdfjs-parser.cjs && node scripts/clean-windows-build-output.cjs && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --win portable
scripts.build:nsis: node scripts/kill-wr-desk.cjs && node scripts/dist-clean-artifacts.cjs && node scripts/copy-pnpm-transitive-deps.cjs && vite build && node scripts/smoke-pdfjs-parser.cjs && node scripts/clean-windows-build-output.cjs && electron-builder -c electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis && node scripts/verify-windows-unpacked.cjs
